AP_BTN.title: Archipelago Rewards
AP_BTN.description: Claim the rewards that have been sent to you from the Multiworld! The items refresh on each new run.
AP_REWARD_CARD_CHECKS.title: Card Checks
AP_REWARD_CARD_CHECKS.description: The number of AP Checks found that replaced Card Rewards
AP_REWARD_RARE_CARD_CHECKS.title: Rare Card Checks
AP_REWARD_RARE_CARD_CHECKS.description: The number of AP Checks found that replaced Rare Card Rewards
AP_REWARD_RELIC_CHECKS.title: Relic Checks
AP_REWARD_RELIC_CHECKS.description: The number of AP Checks found that replaced Relic Rewards
AP_REWARD_FLOORSANITY_CHECKS.title: Floorsanity Checks
AP_REWARD_FLOORSANITY_CHECKS.description: The number of AP Checks sent for each floor reached
AP_REWARD_POTIONSANITY_CHECKS.title: Potionsanity Checks
AP_REWARD_POTIONSANITY_CHECKS.descriptio: The number of AP Checks found that replaced Potion Rewards
AP_REWARD_GOLDSANITY_CHECKS.title: Goldsanity Checks
AP_REWARD_GOLDSANITY_CHECKS.description: The number of AP Checks found that replaced Gold Rewards
AP_REWARD_CAMPFIRESANITY_CHECKS.title: Campfiresanity Checks
AP_REWARD_CAMPFIRESANITY_CHECKS.descript: The number of AP Checks found from Rest Sites
AP_REWARD_PRESS_START_CHECK.title: Pressed Start
AP_REWARD_PRESS_START_CHECK.description: Whether this character has earned a check by starting a run.
AP_REWARD_CLEARED_CHECK.title: Slayed the Spire
AP_REWARD_CLEARED_CHECK.description: Whether this character has earned a check by completing a run.
AP_REWARD_CARD_REWARDS.title: Card Rewards
AP_REWARD_CARD_REWARDS.description: The number of Card Rewards received for this character. You can redeem these at the start of each run.
AP_REWARD_RARE_CARD_REWARDS.title: Rare Card Rewards
AP_REWARD_RARE_CARD_REWARDS.description: The number of Rare Card Rewards received for this character. You can redeem these at the start of each run.
AP_REWARD_RELIC_REWARDS.title: Relic Rewards
AP_REWARD_RELIC_REWARDS.description: The number of Relic Rewards received for this character. You can redeem these at the start of each run.
AP_REWARD_POTION_REWARDS.title: Potion Rewards
AP_REWARD_POTION_REWARDS.description: The number of Potion Rewards received for this character. You can redeem these at the start of each run.
AP_REWARD_GOLD_REWARDS.title: Gold
AP_REWARD_GOLD_REWARDS.description: The total amount of Gold received for this character. You can redeem this at the start of each run.
AP_REWARD_PROGRESSIVE_REST.title: Progressive Rests
AP_REWARD_PROGRESSIVE_REST.description: The number of Progressive Rest rewards received for this character. The number of these represents the highest Act you can Heal at.
AP_REWARD_PROGRESSIVE_SMITH.title: Progressive Smiths
AP_REWARD_PROGRESSIVE_SMITH.description: The number of Progressive Smith rewards received for this character. The number of these represents the highest Act you can Upgrade at.
